name: Sklearn TF-IDF Vectorizer
description: Applies scikit-learn's TfidfVectorizer to a text column. Converts text documents into TF-IDF feature vectors and stores them as an ARRAY column in the Spark DataFrame.
input: Takes a DataFrame with at least one text column.
output: Adds a new column containing TF-IDF vectors as ARRAY and passes the DataFrame to downstream nodes.

fields.name: columnToVectorize
fields.title: Text Column to Vectorize
fields.description: Name of the text column on which TF-IDF should be computed.

fields.name: outputCol
fields.title: Output Column Name
fields.description: Name of the output column that will store TF-IDF vectors as ARRAY. If left empty, defaults to 'tfidf_<columnToVectorize>'.

fields.name: max_df
fields.title: Max Document Frequency (max_df)
fields.description: Ignore terms that appear in more than this proportion of documents. For example, 0.9 drops terms appearing in more than 90% of documents.

fields.name: min_df
fields.title: Min Document Frequency (min_df)
fields.description: Ignore terms that appear in fewer than this number of documents. For example, 2 keeps only terms that appear in at least 2 documents.
